meta.title: MaktabatyPro — Offline Moroccan Document Management
hero.paragraph: Templates, PDF tools, and document management — all offline. Your data never leaves your device. Built for public writers and administrative professionals.
problem.heading: You deserve better than this
problem.card1.title: Your data gets sold
problem.card1.text: Every PDF uploaded to iLovePDF, Smallpdf, or similar services becomes their data. Your clients' names, IDs, addresses — packaged and sold to data brokers.
problem.card2.title: 10+ minutes per document
problem.card2.text: Manually typing the same fields, calculating dates, converting numbers to words. Repetitive work that eats hours from your day — every single day.
problem.card3.title: Too many tools
problem.card3.text: One site for merging, another for splitting, a third for filling templates, a fourth for compression. No unified workflow, no consistency.
features.heading: Templates That Think For You
features.subheading: Not just static forms. Smart templates with variables, logic, and batch processing that cut your work from 10 minutes to 2.
features.old.label: Old Way
features.old.step2: Download it as PDF or Word
features.old.step3: Open in editor, type each field manually
features.old.step5: Convert numbers to words by hand
features.old.step6: Upload to online tool to convert to PDF
features.new.label: MaktabatyPro
features.new.step2: Fill fields — dates and math auto-calculate
features.new.step4: Live preview updates as you type
features.capability.smartVariables.title: Smart Variables
features.capability.smartVariables.text: {{TODAY}}, {{CURRENT_YEAR}}, auto-serial numbers — inserted and calculated automatically.
features.capability.conditionalFields.te: Show or hide sections based on what the user selects. If gender = female, show specific fields. No more irrelevant sections.
features.capability.loopFields.title: Loop Fields
features.capability.loopFields.text: Repeatable field groups — children's names, multiple references, item lists. Add, remove, reorder rows dynamically.
features.capability.mathExpressions.text: {{FIELD1 + FIELD2}}, age from birth date, sum of amounts — all calculated live.
features.capability.batchFill.title: Batch Fill
features.capability.batchFill.text: Fill one template with data for 50 people at once. Perfect for public writers processing documents in bulk.
features.capability.livePreview.title: Live Preview
features.capability.livePreview.text: See the final document update in real-time as you fill each field. No surprises after export.
features.savings: Doing 50+ documents a day? That's 2.5 hours saved daily. Over a month — 50 hours.
testimonials.heading: Public writers across Morocco
testimonials.subheading: A sample of the kind of feedback we hear most often. Replace with your own verified customer quotes before launch.
testimonials.quote1.text: "I used to spend most of my morning retyping the same requests. Now I fill a template, check the preview, and print. Clients notice the difference too."
testimonials.quote1.name: Karim B.
testimonials.quote2.text: "Knowing that client IDs and addresses never touch an online tool matters a lot in my line of work. The batch fill feature alone saves me an hour on busy days."
testimonials.quote2.name: Sanaa A.
testimonials.quote3.text: "One license, three computers in the office, no internet required at our branch with a weak connection. It just works the same everywhere."
testimonials.quote3.name: Youssef T.
faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1.question: Is my data really never sent anywhere?
faq.q1.answer: Correct. MaktabatyPro makes zero network requests. Everything — templates, filled documents, your PDF library — is processed and stored locally on your device in IndexedDB. You can disconnect from the internet entirely and every feature keeps working.
faq.q2.question: What happens after my 3-day trial ends?
faq.q2.answer: Your account and any templates you created stay on your device — they're just locked until you activate a paid license. Activating Standard or Enterprise unlocks everything instantly, with no reinstall needed.
faq.q3.question: Can I move my license to a new computer?
faq.q3.answer: Yes. Standard is licensed to one machine at a time — deactivate on the old device and activate on the new one from the same account. Enterprise covers unlimited machines, so this isn't a concern at all.
faq.q4.question: Can I upgrade from Standard to Enterprise later?
faq.q4.answer: Yes, at any time — contact us and pay only the difference between the two licenses. Your templates, library, and settings carry over automatically.
faq.q5.question: Do you offer refunds?
faq.q5.answer: Yes — every paid license comes with a 3-day money-back guarantee. If MaktabatyPro isn't a fit, contact us and we'll refund you in full, no questions asked.
faq.q6.question: Which languages does the interface support?
faq.q6.answer: Arabic, French, Spanish and English, fully translated including right-to-left layout for Arabic. Switch languages anytime from the footer, even offline. and we will add more.
privacy.feature1.title: Zero network requests
privacy.feature1.text: Everything runs locally in your browser. No servers, no APIs, no telemetry. Disconnect from the internet entirely — it still works.
privacy.feature2.title: Local storage only
privacy.feature2.text: All data stored in IndexedDB on your machine. No cloud sync, no third-party storage. You control the backup — encrypted export files.
privacy.feature3.title: No account required
privacy.feature3.text: No sign-up, no email, no phone number. Download, open, use. Your administrative documents contain national IDs and private data — they should never need an account on someone else's server.
privacy.feature4.title: PDF encryption built-in
privacy.feature4.text: Password-protect exported PDFs with user and owner passwords. Control print, copy, and modification permissions.
privacy.mockup.title: maktabatypro — offline
privacy.mockup.row1.label: No outgoing connections
privacy.mockup.row2.label: Storage: Local IndexedDB

pdfTools.heading: 30 PDF Tools. All Offline.
pdfTools.subheading: No uploads. No queues. No file size limits. Everything processes on your machine, instantly.
moreTools.heading: Everything in one place
moreTools.card1.title: PDF Library
moreTools.card1.text: Store, organize, search, and tag your PDFs. Calendar view, reminders, notes, and analytics.
moreTools.card2.title: Card Designer
moreTools.card2.text: Visual canvas for card and badge layouts. Drag, resize, align, export to PDF.
moreTools.card3.title: Calendar Planning
moreTools.card3.text: Schedule documents on a calendar. Month view, heatmap, drag-and-drop, conflict detection.
moreTools.card4.title: Rich Text Editor
moreTools.card4.text: Full WYSIWYG editor. Save documents, export to PDF or DOCX with formatting intact.
moreTools.card5.title: File Compressor
moreTools.card5.text: Compress images and PDFs locally. Batch processing with size comparison stats.
moreTools.card6.title: Link Library
moreTools.card6.text: Curated bookmarks for admin services. Auto-tag, auto-categorize, import browser bookmarks.
platform.heading: Works everywhere
platform.text: Install as PWA in your browser, or use the desktop app on Windows, macOS, and Linux. Same features, same offline experience, any device.
pricing.heading: Simple. Transparent.
pricing.subheading: No subscriptions. Pay once, use forever.
pricing.footer: One-time payment. No subscriptions. No hidden fees. License valid forever.
pricing.guarantee: 3-day money-back guarantee — not a fit? Get a full refund, no questions asked.
